Provenance.drafts: 4 candidates generated locally via ComfyUI MCP (single pass, no escalation needed); curated per art/pipeline/README.md
Provenance.paintoverNote: c3 (seed+3) -- single centered moss-covered mound doorway, plain dark neutral background (clean cutout), lit lantern, clear readable silhouette. c0/c2 read well artistically but sat inside a full natural-forest scene (not neutral bg, weaker silhouette for cutout); c1 was a stone archway that undersold the 'gnarled root-woven timber gate' subject. Full chain: cutout.py --trim (BiRefNet) -> normalmap.py 2.5 (Sobel).
Provenance.aiDisclosure: AI-generated (SDXL base 1.0) diffuse, background-removed via BiRefNet (cutout.py --trim); normal map derived via normalmap.py (Sobel height-from-luminance, strength 2.5) -- lit Building world sprite per AssetSpec.NormalMap=true. Normal-map QA (bumps brighten toward a swept PointLight2D, windowed pilot scene) passed with the existing Flip-Y-OFF import convention.
